channel.title: Ying Jin (金滢) on Ying Jin
channel.description: Recent content in Ying Jin (金滢) on Ying Jin

item.title: Miscellaneous
item.description: News Archive Jan 2024: Interested in making good decisions with conformal prediction? I’ll give a virtual talk “Selecting Trusted Decisions from AI Black Boxes: Correcting Conformal Prediction for Selective Guarantees” at MLBoost (event link, Jan 4, 2024). This is based on our work on model-free selective inference [1, 2]. Oct-Dec 2023: I’m presenting at INFORMS Annual Meeting, WORDS 2023 at Duke University, Rising Stars in Data Science Workshop at UChicago, and “Causality, generalizability, and robustness” session at ICSDS 2023.

item.title: Research
item.description: Research Interests Conformal prediction Multiple hypothesis testing Causal inference Data-driven decision making Distributional robustness, generalizability, and replicability Preprints Conformal alignment: knowing when to trust foundation models with guarantees Yu Gui*, Ying Jin*, and Zhimei Ren*, 2024. Confidence on the focal: Conformal prediction with selection-conditional coverage Ying Jin* and Zhimei Ren*, 2024. Diagnosing the role of observable distribution shift in scientific replications [awesome-replicability-data] [R package] [shiny app] Ying Jin*, Kevin Guo*, and Dominik Rothenhäusler, 2023.

item.title: Talks
item.description: Conformal Alignment: Knowing When to Trust Foundation Models with Guarantees Joint Conference on Statistics and Data Science, China, July 2024 International Conference on Statistics and Data Science, December 2024 Confidence on the Focal: Conformal Prediction with Selection-Conditional Coverage Hangzhou International Conference on Frontiers of Data Science, China, July 2024 Diagnosing the Role of Observable Distribution Shift in Scientific Replications Joint Statistical Meetings, August 2024 Inaugural Berkeley-Stanford Workshop on Veridical Data Science (lightning talk), May 2024 IMS International Conference on Statistics and Data Science (ICSDS), December 2023 Stanford-Berkeley Joint Colloquium Student Seminar, October 2023 Causality in Practice Conference (Thematic Quarter on Causality), June 2023 Model-Free Selective Inference: From Calibrated Uncertainty to Trusted Decisions

item.title: Teaching
item.description: Guest lecture at STATS 300C - Theory of Statistics (2023 Spring) DataSci112 - Principles of Data Science (TA 2024 Spring) STATS209 - Introduction to Causal Inference (TA 2023 Autumn) STATS204 - Sampling (TA 2023 Spring) STATS320 - Statistical Methods for Neural Data Analysis (TA 2023 Winter) STATS200 - Introduction to Statistical Inference (TA 2022 Autumn) STATS216 - Introduction to Statistical Learning (TA 2022 Summer) STATS60 - Introduction to Statistical Methods: Precalculus (TA 2022 Spring) STATS202 - Data Mining and Analysis (TA 2021 Autumn) STATS241 - Data-driven Financial Econometrics (TA 2021 Spring) STATS240 - Statistical Methods in Finance (TA 2021 Winter) STATS305A - Applied Statistics (TA 2020 Autumn) STATS216 - Introduction to Statistical Learning (TA 2020 Summer) STATS216 - Introduction to Statistical Learning (TA 2020 Winter) STATS205 - Nonparametric Statistics (TA 2019 Autumn)
